title: How to Update Personal Details
content:
**Updating your personal information** (name, address, phone number, email) can be done through the mobile app or by visiting a branch.

**Via Mobile App:**
1. Open the app and tap **Menu** (☰) in the top-left corner.
2. Go to **Profile** → **Personal Information**.
3. Tap **Edit** next to the detail you want to update.
4. Enter the new information and tap **Save**.
5. You will receive an OTP on your registered mobile number — enter it to confirm.

> Never share your OTP with anyone, including bank staff.

**Via Branch:**
1. Visit any branch with a valid **National ID** or **Passport**.
2. Fill in the **Customer Information Update Form** at the service counter.
3. Submit the form with a photocopy of your ID.

Changes typically take **1–2 business days** to reflect.

title: How to Make a Domestic Fund Transfer
content:
**Domestic transfers** (intra-bank and inter-bank via BEFTN/RTGS) are available 24/7 through the mobile app.

**Steps:**
1. Open the app and tap **Transfers** on the home screen.
2. Select **Domestic Transfer**.
3. Choose the transfer type: **Own Account**, **Other Account (Same Bank)**, or **Other Bank (BEFTN/RTGS)**.
4. Enter the **beneficiary account number** and **bank routing number** (for other banks).
5. Enter the **amount** and an optional **reference note**.
6. Review the details on the confirmation screen.
7. Tap **Confirm** and enter your **transaction PIN** or approve with **biometrics**.
8. You will receive an SMS confirmation once the transfer is processed.

> BEFTN transfers are processed in batches; funds typically arrive within 1 business day. RTGS transfers for amounts above ৳1,00,000 are processed in real-time during banking hours.

Daily transfer limits apply. Check **Settings → Transfer Limits** in the app.

title: How to Make an International Wire Transfer (Remittance)
content:
**International transfers** can be initiated through the mobile app or at any branch.

**Via Mobile App:**
1. Tap **Transfers** → **International Transfer**.
2. Select the destination country and currency.
3. Enter the **beneficiary name**, **IBAN / account number**, and **SWIFT/BIC code**.
4. Enter the **amount** in BDT or the foreign currency.
5. Select the **purpose of remittance** from the dropdown (e.g., family support, education).
6. Review exchange rate and fees on the summary screen.
7. Tap **Confirm** and authenticate with your **transaction PIN**.

**Processing time:** 2–5 business days depending on the destination country and correspondent bank.

> Transfers are subject to Bangladesh Bank regulations. Maximum per-transaction limit is USD 10,000 (or equivalent) without additional documentation.

**Required documents for large transfers:** Submit scanned copies of invoice or purpose evidence via **Documents** → **Upload** in the app.

title: How to Check Your Account Balance
content:
You can check your account balance in several ways:

**Mobile App (instant):**
1. Open the app — your balance is displayed on the **Home** screen.
2. For all accounts, tap **Accounts** to see individual balances.
3. Pull down to **refresh** for the latest balance.

**SMS Banking:**
- Text `BAL <last 4 digits of account>` to **16XXX**.
- You will receive your balance via SMS within seconds.

**ATM:**
1. Insert your card and enter your **PIN**.
2. Select **Balance Inquiry** from the menu.
3. Choose to display on screen or print a mini-statement.

**Internet Banking:**
1. Log in at [bank.example.com](https://bank.example.com).
2. Your balance appears on the **Dashboard**.

> Displayed balance is the **available balance** after any holds. Your **ledger balance** may differ if there are pending transactions.

title: How to Download Your Account Statement
content:
Account statements are available as PDF downloads from the mobile app and internet banking.

**Via Mobile App:**
1. Tap **Accounts** and select the account.
2. Tap **Statement** → **Download Statement**.
3. Select the **date range** (up to 12 months at a time).
4. Tap **Generate** — the PDF will appear in your **Downloads** folder.

**Via Internet Banking:**
1. Log in and go to **Accounts** → **Account Statement**.
2. Choose the account, start date, and end date.
3. Click **Download PDF** or **Download Excel**.

**For older statements (beyond 12 months):**
- Visit a branch with your **National ID** and account details.
- Request a **certified statement** — usually ready in 2 business days. A fee may apply.

> Statements downloaded through the app are digitally signed and accepted as official documents by most institutions.

title: How to Block or Unblock Your Debit/Credit Card
content:
**If your card is lost, stolen, or compromised — block it immediately.**

**Block via Mobile App (fastest):**
1. Tap **Cards** on the home screen.
2. Select the card you want to block.
3. Tap **Block Card** and choose the reason (lost, stolen, damaged).
4. Confirm with your **app PIN** or **biometrics**.
5. The card is blocked **instantly**.

**Block via Hotline:**
- Call our 24/7 hotline: **16XXX** and follow the automated IVR to block your card.

> Once blocked, all transactions on the card are declined immediately.

**Unblock a temporarily blocked card:**
1. Go to **Cards** → select the blocked card.
2. Tap **Unblock Card**.
3. Confirm with your **app PIN**.

**Note:** If your card was blocked for security reasons by the bank, you must visit a branch to reactivate it after verification.

title: How to Activate a New Debit Card
content:
Your new debit card must be activated before its first use.

**Activate via Mobile App:**
1. Tap **Cards** → **Activate New Card**.
2. Enter the last 4 digits of your card number.
3. Set a new **4-digit PIN** — choose one you'll remember but avoid obvious numbers like `1234`.
4. Confirm the PIN and tap **Activate**.
5. The card is ready to use immediately.

**Activate via ATM:**
1. Insert the new card at any of our ATMs.
2. Select **PIN Change / Card Activation**.
3. Enter the temporary PIN printed on the card mailer, then set your new PIN.

**Activate via Branch:**
- Visit any branch with your card and **National ID** — a banker will activate it for you.

> For security, sign the back of your card and destroy the card mailer after activation.

> Never use easily guessable PINs such as your birth date or phone number.

title: How to Open a New Bank Account
content:
You can open a savings, current, or fixed deposit account online or at any branch.

**Open Online (Mobile App / Internet Banking):**
1. On the app login screen, tap **Open an Account**.
2. Select the account type: **Savings**, **Current**, or **Fixed Deposit**.
3. Fill in your personal details and upload a photo of your **National ID** (NID) or **Passport**.
4. Take a live selfie for biometric verification.
5. Set your preferred branch and nomination details.
6. Review and submit — approval typically takes **1–2 business days**.
7. Your account number and welcome kit will be sent via SMS and email.

**Open at a Branch:**
1. Visit any branch with:
   - **National ID** (original + photocopy)
   - **2 passport-size photographs**
   - **Nominee's NID photocopy**
   - **Minimum opening deposit** (varies by account type)
2. Fill in the account opening form at the service counter.
3. Collect your account number and chequebook requisition slip.

**Minimum initial deposit:** BDT 500 for savings, BDT 1,000 for current accounts (subject to change).

title: How to Apply for a Loan
content:
We offer personal loans, home loans, auto loans, and small business loans.

**Check eligibility:**
1. Tap **Loans** on the app home screen.
2. Select the loan type (e.g., **Personal Loan**, **Home Loan**).
3. Tap **Check Eligibility** — enter your monthly income, employment type, and desired amount.
4. The app shows you the maximum loan amount and estimated monthly installment (EMI) instantly.

**Apply for a loan:**
1. Tap **Apply Now** after checking eligibility.
2. Fill in the application form with employment, income, and asset details.
3. Upload required documents:
   - **NID / Passport**
   - **Last 3 months' bank statements**
   - **Salary certificate or business registration** (as applicable)
4. Submit the application — a loan officer will contact you within **2 business days**.

**Loan processing time:** 5–7 business days after document verification.

> Loan approval is subject to credit assessment. Interest rates and terms are disclosed before disbursement.

title: How to File a Complaint
content:
We take every complaint seriously and aim to resolve it within **3–5 business days**.

**Via Mobile App:**
1. Tap **Menu** → **Help & Support** → **File a Complaint**.
2. Select the complaint category (e.g., transaction dispute, card issue, service quality).
3. Describe the issue and attach any supporting screenshots or documents.
4. Tap **Submit** — you will receive a **complaint reference number** by SMS.
5. Track the status under **My Complaints** in the app.

**Via Email:**
- Send your complaint to **complaints@bank.example** with your account number and a detailed description.

**Via Branch:**
- Fill in the **Complaint Form** at the customer service counter.

**Escalation:**
If your complaint is not resolved within 5 business days, you may escalate to the **Bangladesh Financial Intelligence Unit (BFIU)** or **Bangladesh Bank's grievance portal**.

> Keep your complaint reference number — it is required for any follow-up.

title: Online Banking Security Tips
content:
Protect your account with these security best practices:

**Password & PIN safety:**
- Use a **strong, unique password** (minimum 8 characters with letters, numbers, and symbols).
- Never reuse your banking password on other websites.
- Change your password every **90 days** via **Settings → Security → Change Password**.

> Never share your OTP, PIN, or password with anyone — including people claiming to be bank staff.

**Device security:**
- Only install the bank's official app from the **Google Play Store** or **Apple App Store**.
- Enable **screen lock** (biometric or PIN) on your device.
- Do not use the app on **rooted or jailbroken** devices.

**Transaction monitoring:**
- Enable **SMS and push notifications** for all transactions under **Settings → Notifications**.
- Review your statement monthly for unrecognised transactions.
- Report suspicious transactions immediately via **Help & Support → Dispute a Transaction**.

**Phishing awareness:**
- We will **never** ask for your OTP, full card number, or password via phone, SMS, or email.
- Always verify the URL — our official site is **bank.example.com** (look for the padlock icon).
- Do not click links in unsolicited SMS or email messages claiming to be from the bank.

title: ATM Services and Usage Guide
content:
Our ATMs are available **24/7** at branches, shopping malls, and key locations nationwide.

**Services available at ATMs:**
- Cash withdrawal
- Balance inquiry and mini-statement
- PIN change
- Cheque deposit (select ATMs)
- Mobile top-up
- Utility bill payment

**How to withdraw cash:**
1. Insert your **debit card** (chip side facing up).
2. Select your **preferred language**.
3. Enter your **4-digit PIN** — shield the keypad while typing.
4. Select **Withdrawal** and choose the account (savings or current).
5. Enter the desired **amount** (must be a multiple of the ATM's denomination).
6. Collect your **cash and card** — do not leave without both.

**Daily ATM withdrawal limit:** BDT 50,000 (can be adjusted in **Settings → Card Limits** in the app).

> If the ATM retains your card, do not leave — call the hotline **16XXX** immediately.

> Inspect the card reader before inserting your card. If it looks tampered or has extra attachments, do not use that ATM and report it.
